purpose: Implement deterministic wishlist domain behavior between persistence and authenticated HTTP routes.
success_outcome: Workflows safely add/remove one customer product and return the exact current minimal projection under retries, concurrency, visibility, and stock changes.
anti_goals: Do not expose Store routes or authenticate users.
Do not cache product snapshots or add cleanup jobs.

success_checks: Add requires exists/published/current-channel/active-category while remove stays actor-scoped and idempotent.
Duplicate/concurrent add converges on one row and the same item shape used by list.
Exact minimal projection hides four catalog cases but keeps out-of-stock visible with is_available false.
evidence_required: Exact projection, four hidden cases, and out-of-stock assertions.

stop_conditions: Product publication, sales-channel, active-category, price, or availability cannot be resolved through supported query boundaries.
Concurrent idempotency would require a distributed lock instead of database uniqueness.
Exact projection would need a stored product snapshot or full catalog/detail copy.
required_handoff: Report changed_files, commands_run, evidence, scope_compliance, and blockers_or_none.
Run /verify TASK-037 before closure; T2 feature completion later requires feature-level red verification.
